/usr/bin/c++ -march=x86-64 -mtune=generic -O2 -pipe -fno-plt -fexceptions         -Wp,-D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=3 -Wformat -Werror=format-security         -fstack-clash-protection -fcf-protection         -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mno-omit-leaf-frame-pointer -Wp,-D_GLIBCXX_ASSERTIONS -g -ffile-prefix-map=/run/media/robin/robinScard/codingStuff/arch-unity7/pkgbuilds/unity-indicators/indicator-datetime/src=/usr/src/debug/indicator-datetime -flto=auto -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now          -Wl,-z,pack-relative-relocs -flto=auto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/indicator-datetime-service.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/indicator-datetime-service.dir/main.cpp.o" -o indicator-datetime-service  libindicatordatetimeservice.a -lgstreamer-1.0 -lnotify -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -laccounts-glib -lmessaging-menu -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -luuid
